corollary4_2_fixed_price_lower_bound.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
corollary4_2_fixed_price_lower_bound.tex_statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Agent] [inst_1 : Nonempty Agent] [DecidableEq Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) {h binCount : ℝ}, (\forall (i : Agent), 0 \le values i) \to 0 < h \to (\exists i, values i = h) \to (\forall (i : Agent), values i \le h) \to logb 2 ↑(card Agent) + 2 \le binCount \to totalValue values \le 4 * binCount * fixedPriceBenchmark values 1

fixedPriceBenchmark.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
fixedPriceBenchmark.tex_statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] [Nonempty Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) (minWinners : ℕ) = (Finset.univ : Finset Agent).sup' (by obtain ⟨i⟩ = (inferInstance : Nonempty Agent) exact ⟨i, by simp⟩) (candidateFixedPriceRevenue values minWinners)

lemma6_1_fair_coin.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
lemma6_1_fair_coin.tex_statement: \forall {Index : Type u_1} (s : Finset Index) (keep : Bool), (productMeasure Index).real {side | (\sum i \in s, if side i = keep then 1 else 0) \le ↑card / 3} \le exp (-↑card / 36)

lemma8_1_truthful_monotone.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
lemma8_1_truthful_monotone.tex_statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : DecidableEq Agent] (M : DigitalGoodsAuction Agent), truthful M \to \forall (bids : Agent \to ℝ) (i : Agent) {low high : ℝ}, low < high \to allocation (update bids i low) i \le allocation (update bids i high) i

lemma9_2_threshold_domination.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
lemma9_2_threshold_domination.tex_statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : DecidableEq Agent] (M : DigitalGoodsAuction Agent), truthful M \to IndividuallyRational \to NoPositiveTransfers \to BinaryAllocation \to \forall (bids : Agent \to ℝ) (i : Agent), \exists threshold, 0 \le threshold \land DeterministicOfferThresholdDominates (deterministicAuctionOffer M bids i) threshold

revenue.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
revenue.tex_statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] (M : DigitalGoodsAuction Agent) (values : Agent \to ℝ) = \sum i : Agent, M.payment values i

singlePriceRevenue.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
singlePriceRevenue.tex_statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) (p : ℝ) = \sum i : Agent, if p \le values i then p else 0

theorem4_1_high_value.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem4_1_high_value.tex_statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Agent] [inst_1 : Nonempty Agent] [DecidableEq Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) {h : ℝ}, 1 \le h \to (\forall (i : Agent), 1 \le values i) \to (\forall (i : Agent), values i \le h) \to totalValue values \le 2 * (logb 2 h + 2) * fixedPriceBenchmark values 1

theorem6_2_random_sampling.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem6_2_random_sampling.tex_statement: \forall {n : ℕ} [inst : NeZero n] (values : Fin n \to ℝ) (keep : Bool) {alpha : ℕ} {highValue : ℝ}, 0 < highValue \to (\forall (i : Fin n), values i \le highValue) \to ↑alpha * highValue \le fixedPriceBenchmark values 1 \to 1 - exp (-↑alpha / 36) - 40 * exp (-↑alpha / 72) \le (productMeasure (Fin n)).real {side | fixedPriceBenchmark values 1 \le 6 * (thresholdPriceAuction (crossSampleCandidateOfferThreshold side 1)).revenue values}

theorem7_1_weighted_pairing.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem7_1_weighted_pairing.tex_statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Agent] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Agent] [inst_2 : LinearOrder Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) {h total : ℝ}, total = totalValue values \to 1 \le h \to (\forall (i : Agent), 1 \le values i) \to (\forall (i : Agent), values i \le h) \to 4 * h \le total \to total \le 192 * (logb 2 h + 2) * weightedPairingRevenue values

theorem7_2_weighted_pairing_benchmark.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem7_2_weighted_pairing_benchmark.tex_statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Agent] [inst_1 : Nonempty Agent] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Agent] [inst_3 : LinearOrder Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) {h total s : ℝ}, total = totalValue values \to 1 \le h \to (\forall (i : Agent), 1 \le values i) \to (\forall (i : Agent), values i \le h) \to 2 * h \le twoWinnerBenchmark values \to 2 \le s \to logb 2 h + 2 \le s ^ 2 \to twoWinnerBenchmark values \le 576 * s * weightedPairingRevenue values

theorem8_2_truthful_revenue_upper_bound.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem8_2_truthful_revenue_upper_bound.tex_statement: \forall {Agent : Type u_1} {Price : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Agent] [inst_1 : Nonempty Agent] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Agent] [inst_3 : Fintype Price] [inst_4 : DecidableEq Price] [LinearOrder Agent] (model : PaperTheorem82JournalRawCDFMonotoneOfferSourceModel Agent Price), paper_theorem8_2_raw_cdf_expected_revenue values price offerLaw \le fixedPriceBenchmark values 1

theorem9_1_bid_independent_lower_bound.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem9_1_bid_independent_lower_bound.tex_statement: \forall (priceRule : List ℝ \to ℝ) {highValue alpha : ℕ}, 2 \le highValue \to 0 < alpha \to \exists highCount lowCount, ↑highValue * twoValueBidIndependentPriceRevenue (twoValueListBidIndependentThresholdPrice priceRule highValue) highValue highCount lowCount \le twoValueFixedPriceBenchmark highValue highCount lowCount \land ↑highValue * ↑alpha \le twoValueFixedPriceBenchmark highValue highCount lowCount

theorem9_3_deterministic_truthful_lower_.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem9_3_deterministic_truthful_lower_.tex_statement: \forall {highValue alpha : ℕ} (model : PaperTheorem93PrimitiveSetOfBidsDeterministicSourceModel highValue), 2 \le highValue \to 0 < alpha \to \exists highCount lowCount, (auctionFamily highCount lowCount).revenue (twoValueBidProfile highValue highCount lowCount) / twoValueFixedPriceBenchmark highValue highCount lowCount \le 1 / ↑highValue \land ↑highValue * ↑alpha \le twoValueFixedPriceBenchmark highValue highCount lowCount

totalValue.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
totalValue.tex_statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) = \sum i : Agent, values i

truthful.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
truthful.tex_statement: {Agent : Type*} [DecidableEq Agent] (M : DigitalGoodsAuction Agent) = \forall (values : Agent \to ℝ) (i : Agent) (report : ℝ), M.utility values i (Function.update values i report) \le M.utility values i values

twoWinnerBenchmark.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
twoWinnerBenchmark.tex_statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] [Nonempty Agent] [DecidableEq Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) = twoWinnerFixedPriceBenchmarkValue values

weightedPairingRevenue.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
weightedPairingRevenue.tex_statement: {Agent : Type*} [Fintype Agent] [DecidableEq Agent] [LinearOrder Agent] (values : Agent \to ℝ) = weightedPairingExpectedRevenue values

prompt_summary: Translate each Lean declaration from the Lean statement alone, with no paper context.
Preserve every visible variable, binder, hypothesis, domain condition, equivalence or implication direction, and conclusion.
Do not replace formulas with theorem labels, informal endpoints, or proof-route summaries.
